articles.title: "That changed everything...": Gisele Bündchen breaks silence on the life she shared with Tom Brady after snubbing him on Father's Day
articles.description: Tom Brady and Gisele Bundchen marriage continues to dominate headlines even though it has been close to four years since they divorced one another and moved on in their lives. While Gisele Bundchen recently sparked outrage as she snubbed Tom Brady on Father’s Day, the Brazilian supermodel has now reflected on the life she shared with the NFL legend.

articles.title: 'Stranger Things' stars Millie-David to REUNITE for next
articles.description: Millie Bobby Brown and David Harbour are reuniting for a new Netflix series, playing estranged father and daughter. Harbour portrays a disgraced FBI agent pulled back into the field when his daughter, also an agent, vanishes. This marks their second on-screen father-daughter pairing after their iconic roles in 'Stranger Things'. Both actors are executive producers on the project, which Harbour described as a "simple rupture-and-repair thing" following past speculation.

articles.title: "My body failed": Dwyane Wade's wife Gabrielle Union breaks silence on the emotional toll of fertility issues
articles.description: Dwyane Wade and his wife, the renowned actress Gabrielle Union, seem to have build a perfect lives for themselves and their only daughter together, Kaavia Wade, after she was born in 2018. While Gabrielle Union has earned millions through her successful career in Hollywood, it seems the popular actress continues to suffer in silence for the pain that fertility issues had caused.

articles.title: Abhishek and Karisma's wedding was called off over prenuptial agreement
articles.description: Abhishek Bachchan and Karisma Kapoor's broken engagement continues to remain one of Bollywood's most talked-about relationships. While neither the Bachchan nor the Kapoor family has ever officially confirmed the exact reason behind the split, senior journalist Jyothi Venkatesh has now shared what he claims was one of the major factors behind the wedding being called off.

articles.title: Weekly Horoscope for ♉ TAURUS (June 27 - July 3, 2026): A Major Reward Could Arrive Just When You Need It Most
articles.description: Taurus Weekly Horoscope (27th June 2026 to 3rd July 2026): Taurus, this week brings a reassuring sense of progress and emotional stability. Many of the efforts you have been making quietly behind the scenes are now beginning to show positive results. You may notice that situations which previously felt uncertain are becoming clearer and easier to manage. This is a week where your natural patience becomes one of your greatest strengths. Instead of feeling pressured to rush, you are encouraged to trust your own pace. The universe reminds you that lasting success is built slowly, and your consistent efforts are creating a strong foundation for future growth. Discover what Sandeep Agarwal of Meditate Wisdom reveals in this weekly horoscope for taurus, offering in-depth insights aligned with this taurus weekly horoscope.

articles.title: SS Rajamouli French Retrospective Planned; Screenings To Carry First Look At Varanasi And Animated Baahubali Film
articles.description: For the next week, filmmaker SS Rajamouli will be touring France and screening his biggest hits in Telugu. Ahead of the films, fans will also get a first glimpse at his upcoming projects Varanasi and Baahubali: The Eternal War.

articles.title: Weekly Horoscope for ♈ ARIES (June 27 - July 3, 2026): Unexpected News Could Accelerate Your Goals This Week
articles.description: Aries Weekly Horoscope (27th June 2026 to 3rd July 2026): Aries, this week brings renewed enthusiasm, stronger motivation, and opportunities to make noticeable progress. You may feel a growing desire to take control of situations that have been developing slowly. The difference now is that your actions are supported by greater wisdom and experience. Instead of rushing ahead impulsively, you are beginning to understand the value of timing and preparation. This creates a powerful combination that helps you achieve better results. The week encourages you to trust your instincts while remaining patient enough to allow opportunities to unfold naturally. Explore what Sandeep Agarwal of Meditate Wisdom predicts in this weekly horoscope for aries, offering insights into balance, strategy, and resilience through this detailed aries weekly horoscope.

articles.title: "She was heartbroken": Taylor Swift and Blake Lively's bond reportedly changed as the pop star planned her life with Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly tying the knot next week and all eyes are on whether the high profile couple are inviting popular Hollywood actress Blake Lively to their wedding which is happening in New York. Though Blake Lively has disappeared from the public eye, it seems Taylor Swift’s bond with her really suffered in the last few months.

articles.title: Quote of the day by British-American theoretical physicist Freeman Dyson: "We must be careful not to discourage our twelve-year-olds by..."
articles.description: Renowned physicist Freeman Dyson cautioned against excessive exam preparation stifling children's natural curiosity. He argued that focusing solely on tests at a young age, particularly around twelve, can extinguish the joy of learning. Dyson believed fostering a love for exploration and unstructured discovery is crucial for developing genuine thinkers, rather than just proficient test-takers. His perspective highlights the hidden cost of prioritizing grades over intellectual wonder.

For Indian fans, these high-stakes games kick off in the early hours of June 28, promising thrilling football as teams vie for top group positions and a favourable path forward.

articles.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai actress Shubhangi Atre opens up on loneliness in industry; says 'You can be surrounded by people and still feel unheard'
articles.description: In an insightful revelation, Shubhangi Atre, famed for her role as Angoori Bhabi, shared her experiences of loneliness within the entertainment world. She believes this loneliness is not just about being alone, but rather the absence of substantial dialogue. Stating that true empathy outweighs mere advice, she remarked on social media's inability to forge real connections.

articles.title: Adam McKay and Will Ferrell’s fall out: ‘Vice’ star reveals they had a ‘great run’, open to working together again
articles.description: Filmmaker Adam McKay has recently shared his eagerness to reunite with his long-time comedic ally, Will Ferrell, after their split in 2019 due to tensions surrounding their production company, Gary Sanchez. McKay fondly reminisced about their collaborative efforts and emphasized that he harbors no resentment. He remains optimistic about the possibility of future collaborations, highlighting the creative chemistry they once shared.

articles.title: 'Without G-Spark, it’s incomplete': Fans react to Hindi adaptation of Sanju Rathod's 'Gulabi Sadi' in 'Dhamaal 4' starring Riteish Deshmukh and Anjali Anand
articles.description: The makers of 'Dhamaal 4' have released 'Saree,' a Bollywood rendition of the viral Marathi hit "Gulabi Sadi." While Tanishk Bagchi recreated the music and Kumaar penned new lyrics, fans are celebrating singer Sanju Rathod's entry into Hindi cinema. Despite the appreciation, some listeners miss the original production by G-Spark. The film, featuring a star-studded cast, is set to hit theatres on July 10.

articles.description: Akshay Kumar and Disha Patani's song, Kyun from Welcome To The Jungle, plays during the film's interval. It is composed, produced and written by Talwiinder, who is rumoured to be the actress' boyfriend.

articles.title: Actor Darshan's son's car involved in accident in Bengaluru? Family clarifies what really happened
articles.description: Rumours claimed that Darshan Thoogudeepa's son, Vineesh, was injured and hospitalised after a road accident in Bengaluru, but his family has dismissed the reports as false, saying he is safe and was not driving the vehicle.

articles.title: Priyanka Chopra on success: 'I can make mistakes, I'm human' at Cannes
articles.description: Speaking at Cannes Lions, Priyanka Chopra Jonas said embracing imperfection and authenticity, not perfection, has been key to her success. She said connecting with fans by admitting mistakes and evolving has been central to her decades-long career.

articles.title: From contestant to collaborator: Debojit Dutta’s full-circle moment with Shankar Mahadevan
articles.description: For composer Debojit Dutta, Naqsh-e-Qadam marks the fulfilment of a dream that began during his stint as a contestant on Sa Re Ga Ma Pa in 2008. Nearly two decades later, he has composed a song sung by his former mentor and one of India’s most celebrated musicians, Shankar Mahadevan. Debojit reflects on the journey from contestant to collaborator, while Mahadevan speaks about nurturing young talent, respecting a composer’s vision and staying grounded despite global recognition, including a Grammy Award. Together, they celebrate a partnership built on admiration, humility and a shared passion for music.

articles.description: The premiere of Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle' has drawn an overwhelmingly positive response, with viewers lauding its relentless humor and entertaining experience. This star-studded comedy is celebrated for encapsulating the frivolous essence of Bollywood. While a few critics argue it was overly prolonged and missed depth, plenty of moviegoers are eager for its box office triumph, especially those in search of unadulterated amusement.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay showcases impressive fitness at 53
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay, at 53, demonstrated remarkable fitness by completing a 6km 'Start Run, Stop Drugs' marathon in Chennai. Leading thousands, including ministers and volunteers, he administered an anti-drug pledge and actively participated, even offering water to fellow runners. Videos of his energetic run and motivational presence have gone viral, highlighting his disciplined lifestyle and commitment to public awareness.
